zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas John Poultney於1442年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓時，他的父親John Owen dePoultney28歲，母親Rosea Marie Graftiter21歲。他和Roisia Lucy至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1507年5月7日在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas John Poultney于1442年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓时，他的父亲John Owen dePoultney28岁，母亲Rosea Marie Graftiter21岁。他和Roisia Lucy至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1507年5月7日在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Poultney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pountney
meanings: English: locative name from Poultney (Leics), which is recorded as Pontenei in 1086 and Pulteney in 1220. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pulta (genitive * Pultan) + Old English ēg ‘island, piece of dry ground in a fen’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas John Poultney was born in 1442, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, his father, John Owen dePoultney, was 28 and his mother, Rosea Marie Graftiter, was 21. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Roisia Lucy. He died on 7 May 1507, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas John Poultney est né en 1442, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Owen dePoultney, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Rosea Marie Graftiter, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Roisia Lucy. Il est décédé le 7 mai 1507, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas John Poultney 1442 in Misterton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Owen dePoultney 28 und seine Mutter Rosea Marie Graftiter 21. Er hatte mit Roisia Lucy mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Mai 1507 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas John Poultney è nato il nel 1442 nel Misterton, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, John Owen dePoultney, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Rosea Marie Graftiter, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Roisia Lucy. Morì il 7 maggio 1507, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas John Poultney(이)가 1442년 영국 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Owen dePoultney(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Rosea Marie Graftiter(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Roisia Lucy(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1507년 5월 7일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Roisia Lucy. Ele faleceu em 7 de maio de 1507, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas John Poultney родился в 1442 г. в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Owen dePoultney было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosea Marie Graftiter, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Roisia Lucy. Он умер 7 мая 1507 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Roisia Lucy. Murió el 7 de mayo de 1507, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
